title: Milestone
description: Milestone milestone is a collection of issues on one repository

closed_issues.description: ClosedIssues is the number of closed issues in this milestone

description.description: Description provides details about the milestone

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the milestone

open_issues.description: OpenIssues is the number of open issues in this milestone

state.description:
State indicates if the milestone is open or closed
open StateOpen  StateOpen pr is opened
closed StateClosed  StateClosed pr is closed
state.x-go-enum-desc:
open StateOpen  StateOpen pr is opened
closed StateClosed  StateClosed pr is closed

title.description: Title is the title of the milestone
